title: BlackBox Quiz Competition
subtitle: An engaging quiz competition designed to spark curiosity and test knowledge in science and technology. The event promoted intellectual interaction and provided a dynamic platform for experiential learning among students.
description:
Title of the Event: BlackBox Quiz Competition 
 Objective of the Event: To conceptualize, organize, and successfully host a comprehensive quiz event designed specifically for Science and Technology enthusiasts, fostering intellectual engagement and academic curiosity among students. 
 Benefits in terms of learning, skills, and knowledge gained: Our recent Science and Technology quiz was far more than a competitive academic event, it served as a dynamic platform for experiential learning and intellectual.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Encouraged analytical reasoning, logical thinking, rapid problem-solving, and effective decision-making.
